ast.name: description

ast.target: 此帖子的自标签值。实际上是内容警告。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Additional hashtags, in addition to any included in post text and facets.
ast.target: 额外的话题标签，除了帖子文本和facet中包含的任何标签。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Client-declared timestamp when this post was originally created.
ast.target: 客户端声明的帖子最初创建时间戳。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Deprecated: use facets instead.
ast.target: 已弃用：请改用facet。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Expected values are 'mention' and 'link'.
ast.target: 预期值为“mention”和“link”。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Deprecated. Use app.bsky.richtext instead -- A text segment. Start is inclusive, end is exclusive. Indices are for utf16-encoded strings.
ast.target: 已弃用。请改用app.bsky.richtext -- 一个文本段。起始位置包含，结束位置不包含。索引适用于utf16编码的字符串。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Record defining interaction rules for a post. The record key (rkey) of the postgate record must match the record key of the post, and that record must be in the same repository.
ast.target: 定义帖子交互规则的记录。帖子门控记录的记录键（rkey）必须与帖子的记录键匹配，并且该记录必须在同一存储库中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reference (AT-URI) to the post record.
ast.target: 帖子记录的引用（AT-URI）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Record representing a 'repost' of an existing Bluesky post.
ast.target: 表示现有Bluesky帖子的“转发”的记录。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Find posts matching search criteria, returning views of those posts.
ast.target: 查找符合搜索条件的帖子，返回这些帖子的视图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search query string; syntax, phrase, boolean, and faceting is unspecified, but Lucene query syntax is recommended.
ast.target: 搜索查询字符串；语法、短语、布尔和facet未指定，但推荐使用Lucene查询语法。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the ranking order of results.
ast.target: 指定结果的排序顺序。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Filter results for posts after the indicated datetime (inclusive). Expected to use 'sortAt' timestamp, which may not match 'createdAt'. Can be a datetime, or just an ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD).
ast.target: 过滤指示日期时间之后（包含）的帖子结果。预期使用“sortAt”时间戳，该时间戳可能与“createdAt”不匹配。可以是日期时间，或仅是ISO日期（YYYY-MM-DD）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Filter results for posts before the indicated datetime (not inclusive). Expected to use 'sortAt' timestamp, which may not match 'createdAt'. Can be a datetime, or just an ISO date (YYY-MM-DD).
ast.target: 过滤指示日期时间之前（不包含）的帖子结果。预期使用“sortAt”时间戳，该时间戳可能与“createdAt”不匹配。可以是日期时间，或仅是ISO日期（YYY-MM-DD）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Filter to posts which mention the given account. Handles are resolved to DID before query-time. Only matches rich-text facet mentions.
ast.target: 过滤提及给定账户的帖子。在查询前将句柄解析为DID。仅匹配富文本facet提及。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Filter to posts by the given account. Handles are resolved to DID before query-time.
ast.target: 过滤给定账户发布的帖子。在查询前将句柄解析为DID。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Filter to posts in the given language. Expected to be based on post language field, though server may override language detection.
ast.target: 过滤给定语言的帖子。预期基于帖子语言字段，但服务器可能覆盖语言检测。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Filter to posts with the given tag (hashtag), based on rich-text facet or tag field. Do not include the hash (#) prefix. Multiple tags can be specified, with 'AND' matching.
ast.target: 过滤具有给定标签（话题标签）的帖子，基于富文本facet或标签字段。不要包含井号（#）前缀。可以指定多个标签，使用“AND”匹配。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional pagination mechanism; may not necessarily allow scrolling through entire result set.
ast.target: 可选的分页机制；不一定允许滚动浏览整个结果集。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Count of search hits. Optional, may be rounded/truncated, and may not be possible to paginate through all hits.
ast.target: 搜索命中计数。可选，可能被四舍五入/截断，并且可能无法分页浏览所有命中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Record defining interaction gating rules for a thread (aka, reply controls). The record key (rkey) of the threadgate record must match the record key of the thread's root post, and that record must be in the same repository.
ast.target: 定义线程（即回复控制）交互门控规则的记录。线程门控记录的记录键（rkey）必须与线程根帖子的记录键匹配，并且该记录必须在同一存储库中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List of hidden reply URIs.
ast.target: 隐藏回复URI列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Allow replies from actors mentioned in your post.
ast.target: 允许帖子中提及的参与者回复。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Allow replies from actors you follow.
ast.target: 允许你关注的参与者回复。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Allow replies from actors on a list.
ast.target: 允许列表中的参与者回复。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Record declaring a 'block' relationship against another account. NOTE: blocks are public in Bluesky; see blog posts for details.
ast.target: 声明对另一个账户的“屏蔽”关系的记录。注意：在Bluesky中屏蔽是公开的；详情请参阅博客文章。

ast.name: description
ast.source: DID of the account to be blocked.
ast.target: 要屏蔽的账户的DID。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A list of actors to apply an aggregate moderation action (mute/block) on.
ast.target: 要应用聚合审核操作（静音/屏蔽）的参与者列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A list of actors used for curation purposes such as list feeds or interaction gating.
ast.target: 用于策展目的（如列表信息流或交互门控）的参与者列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A list of actors used for only for reference purposes such as within a starter pack.
ast.target: 仅用于参考目的（如在入门包中）的参与者列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: indicates that a handle or DID could not be resolved
ast.target: 表示句柄或DID无法解析。

ast.name: description
ast.source: lists the bi-directional graph relationships between one actor (not indicated in the object), and the target actors (the DID included in the object)
ast.target: 列出一个参与者（未在对象中指示）与目标参与者（对象中包含的DID）之间的双向图关系。

ast.name: description
ast.source: if the actor follows this DID, this is the AT-URI of the follow record
ast.target: 如果参与者关注此DID，则这是关注记录的AT-URI。

ast.name: description
ast.source: if the actor is followed by this DID, contains the AT-URI of the follow record
ast.target: 如果参与者被此DID关注，则包含关注记录的AT-URI。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Record declaring a social 'follow' relationship of another account. Duplicate follows will be ignored by the AppView.
ast.target: 声明对另一个账户的社交“关注”关系的记录。重复的关注将被AppView忽略。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get a list of starter packs created by the actor.
ast.target: 获取参与者创建的入门包列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enumerates which accounts the requesting account is currently blocking. Requires auth.
ast.target: 枚举请求账户当前正在屏蔽的账户。需要认证。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enumerates accounts which follow a specified account (actor).
ast.target: 枚举关注指定账户（参与者）的账户。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enumerates accounts which a specified account (actor) follows.
ast.target: 枚举指定账户（参与者）关注的账户。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enumerates accounts which follow a specified account (actor) and are followed by the viewer.
ast.target: 枚举关注指定账户（参与者）且被查看者关注的账户。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets a 'view' (with additional context) of a specified list.
ast.target: 获取指定列表的“视图”（附加上下文）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reference (AT-URI) of the list record to hydrate.
ast.target: 要水化的列表记录的引用（AT-URI）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get mod lists that the requesting account (actor) is blocking. Requires auth.
ast.target: 获取请求账户（参与者）正在屏蔽的审核列表。需要认证。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enumerates mod lists that the requesting account (actor) currently has muted. Requires auth.
ast.target: 枚举请求账户（参与者）当前已静音的审核列表。需要认证。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enumerates the lists created by a specified account (actor).
ast.target: 枚举指定账户（参与者）创建的列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The account (actor) to enumerate lists from.
ast.target: 要枚举列表的账户（参与者）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enumerates accounts that the requesting account (actor) currently has muted. Requires auth.
ast.target: 枚举请求账户（参与者）当前已静音的账户。需要认证。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enumerates public relationships between one account, and a list of other accounts. Does not require auth.
ast.target: 枚举一个账户与一组其他账户之间的公开关系。无需认证。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Primary account requesting relationships for.
ast.target: 请求关系的主要账户。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List of 'other' accounts to be related back to the primary.
ast.target: 要与主要账户关联的“其他”账户列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: the primary actor at-identifier could not be resolved
ast.target: 主要参与者的at-标识符无法解析。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets a view of a starter pack.
ast.target: 获取入门包的视图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reference (AT-URI) of the starter pack record.
ast.target: 入门包记录的引用（AT-URI）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get views for a list of starter packs.
ast.target: 获取入门包列表的视图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enumerates follows similar to a given account (actor). Expected use is to recommend additional accounts immediately after following one account.
ast.target: 枚举与给定账户（参与者）相似的关注。预期用途是在关注一个账户后立即推荐其他账户。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, response has fallen-back to generic results, and is not scoped using relativeToDid
ast.target: 如果为true，则响应已回退到通用结果，并且未使用relativeToDid进行范围限定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Record representing a list of accounts (actors). Scope includes both moderation-oriented lists and curration-oriented lists.
ast.target: 表示账户（参与者）列表的记录。范围包括审核导向的列表和策展导向的列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines the purpose of the list (aka, moderation-oriented or curration-oriented)
ast.target: 定义列表的目的（即审核导向或策展导向）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Record representing a block relationship against an entire an entire list of accounts (actors).
ast.target: 表示对整个账户（参与者）列表的屏蔽关系的记录。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reference (AT-URI) to the mod list record.
ast.target: 审核列表记录的引用（AT-URI）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The account which is included on the list.
ast.target: 包含在列表中的账户。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reference (AT-URI) to the list record (app.bsky.graph.list).
ast.target: 列表记录的引用（AT-URI）（app.bsky.graph.list）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Creates a mute relationship for the specified account. Mutes are private in Bluesky. Requires auth.
ast.target: 为指定账户创建静音关系。在Bluesky中静音是私密的。需要认证。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Creates a mute relationship for the specified list of accounts. Mutes are private in Bluesky. Requires auth.
ast.target: 为指定账户列表创建静音关系。在Bluesky中静音是私密的。需要认证。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Mutes a thread preventing notifications from the thread and any of its children. Mutes are private in Bluesky. Requires auth.
ast.target: 静音一个线程，阻止来自该线程及其任何子线程的通知。在Bluesky中静音是私密的。需要认证。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Record defining a starter pack of actors and feeds for new users.
ast.target: 定义为新用户准备的参与者和信息流入门包的记录。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unmutes the specified account. Requires auth.
ast.target: 取消静音指定账户。需要认证。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unmutes the specified list of accounts. Requires auth.
ast.target: 取消静音指定账户列表。需要认证。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unmutes the specified thread. Requires auth.
ast.target: 取消静音指定线程。需要认证。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The label values which this labeler publishes. May include global or custom labels.
ast.target: 此标签发布者发布的标签值。可能包括全局或自定义标签。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Label values created by this labeler and scoped exclusively to it. Labels defined here will override global label definitions for this labeler.
ast.target: 由此标签发布者创建且专门限定于其范围的标签值。此处定义的标签将覆盖此标签发布者的全局标签定义。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get information about a list of labeler services.
ast.target: 获取标签服务列表的信息。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A declaration of the existence of labeler service.
ast.target: 声明标签服务存在的记录。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Count the number of unread notifications for the requesting account. Requires auth.
ast.target: 统计请求账户的未读通知数量。需要认证。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enumerate notifications for the requesting account. Requires auth.
ast.target: 枚举请求账户的通知。需要认证。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Expected values are 'like', 'repost', 'follow', 'mention', 'reply', 'quote', and 'starterpack-joined'.
ast.target: 预期值为“like”、“repost”、“follow”、“mention”、“reply”、“quote”和“starterpack-joined”。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Set notification-related preferences for an account. Requires auth.
ast.target: 设置账户的通知相关偏好。需要认证。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Register to receive push notifications, via a specified service, for the requesting account. Requires auth.
ast.target: 注册通过指定服务接收请求账户的推送通知。需要认证。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Notify server that the requesting account has seen notifications. Requires auth.
ast.target: 通知服务器请求账户已查看通知。需要认证。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Annotation of a sub-string within rich text.
ast.target: 富文本中子字符串的注释。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Facet feature for mention of another account. The text is usually a handle, including a '@' prefix, but the facet reference is a DID.
ast.target: 用于提及另一个账户的facet功能。文本通常是句柄，包含“@”前缀，但facet引用是DID。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Facet feature for a URL. The text URL may have been simplified or truncated, but the facet reference should be a complete URL.
ast.target: 用于URL的facet功能。文本URL可能已被简化或截断，但facet引用应是完整的URL。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Facet feature for a hashtag. The text usually includes a '#' prefix, but the facet reference should not (except in the case of 'double hash tags').
ast.target: 标签的功能特性。文本通常包含 '#' 前缀，但功能引用不应包含（'双标签'情况除外）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get miscellaneous runtime configuration.
ast.target: 获取杂项运行时配置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: An unspecced view of globally popular feed generators.
ast.target: 一个未经规范定义的、全球热门的动态源生成器视图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get a skeleton of suggested actors. Intended to be called and then hydrated through app.bsky.actor.getSuggestions
ast.target: 获取推荐用户的骨架数据。旨在调用后通过 app.bsky.actor.getSuggestions 进行数据填充。

ast.name: description
ast.source: DID of the account making the request (not included for public/unauthenticated queries). Used to boost followed accounts in ranking.
ast.target: 发出请求的账户的 DID（公开/未认证查询中不包含）。用于在排名中提升已关注账户的权重。

ast.name: description
ast.source: DID of the account to get suggestions relative to. If not provided, suggestions will be based on the viewer.
ast.target: 要获取推荐的相对账户的 DID。如果未提供，推荐将基于当前查看者。

ast.name: description
ast.source: DID of the account these suggestions are relative to. If this is returned undefined, suggestions are based on the viewer.
ast.target: 这些推荐所相对的账户的 DID。如果此字段返回未定义，则推荐基于当前查看者。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get a list of suggestions (feeds and users) tagged with categories
ast.target: 获取带有类别标签的推荐列表（动态源和用户）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Backend Actors (profile) search, returns only skeleton.
ast.target: 后端用户（个人资料）搜索，仅返回骨架数据。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search query string; syntax, phrase, boolean, and faceting is unspecified, but Lucene query syntax is recommended. For typeahead search, only simple term match is supported, not full syntax.
ast.target: 搜索查询字符串；语法、短语、布尔值和分面未指定，但推荐使用 Lucene 查询语法。对于即时搜索，仅支持简单的词语匹配，不支持完整语法。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, acts as fast/simple 'typeahead' query.
ast.target: 如果为 true，则作为快速/简单的'即时搜索'查询。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Backend Posts search, returns only skeleton
ast.target: 后端帖子搜索，仅返回骨架数据。

ast.name: description
ast.source: DID of the account making the request (not included for public/unauthenticated queries). Used for 'from:me' queries.
ast.target: 发出请求的账户的 DID（公开/未认证查询中不包含）。用于 'from:me' 查询。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The state of the video processing job. All values not listed as a known value indicate that the job is in process.
ast.target: 视频处理任务的状态。所有未列为已知值的值都表示任务正在处理中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Progress within the current processing state.
ast.target: 当前处理状态内的进度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get status details for a video processing job.
ast.target: 获取视频处理任务的状态详情。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get video upload limits for the authenticated user.
ast.target: 获取已认证用户的视频上传限制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Upload a video to be processed then stored on the PDS.
ast.target: 上传一个视频，经处理后存储在 PDS 上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A declaration of a Bluesky chat account.
ast.target: 一个 Bluesky 聊天账户的声明。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Set to true when the actor cannot actively participate in converations
ast.target: 当参与者无法主动参与对话时设置为 true。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Conversation that the message is from. NOTE: this field will eventually be required.
ast.target: 消息来源的对话。注意：此字段最终将成为必填项。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Message language.
ast.target: 消息语言。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Timestamp referencing when the last update was made to the moderation status of the subject
ast.target: 引用上次更新主题审核状态的时间戳。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sticky comment on the subject.
ast.target: 主题的置顶评论。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Timestamp referencing when the author of the subject appealed a moderation action
ast.target: 引用主题作者对审核操作提出申诉的时间戳。

ast.name: description
ast.source: True indicates that the a previously taken moderator action was appealed against, by the author of the content. False indicates last appeal was resolved by moderators.
ast.target: True 表示内容作者对之前采取的审核操作提出了申诉。False 表示上次申诉已由审核员解决。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Moderator review status of a subject: Open. Indicates that the subject needs to be reviewed by a moderator
ast.target: 主题的审核员审查状态：开放。表示该主题需要审核员审查。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Moderator review status of a subject: Escalated. Indicates that the subject was escalated for review by a moderator
ast.target: 主题的审核员审查状态：已升级。表示该主题已被升级以供审核员审查。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Moderator review status of a subject: Closed. Indicates that the subject was already reviewed and resolved by a moderator
ast.target: 主题的审核员审查状态：已关闭。表示该主题已被审核员审查并解决。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Moderator review status of a subject: Unnecessary. Indicates that the subject does not need a review at the moment but there is probably some moderation related metadata available for it
ast.target: 主题的审核员审查状态：非必需。表示该主题目前不需要审查，但可能有一些相关的审核元数据可用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates how long the takedown should be in effect before automatically expiring.
ast.target: 指示下架操作应在自动过期前持续生效多长时间。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, all other reports on content authored by this account will be resolved (acknowledged).
ast.target: 如果为 true，则此账户创作的所有其他内容的报告都将被解决（已确认）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Revert take down action on a subject
ast.target: 撤销对主题的下架操作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describe reasoning behind the reversal.
ast.target: 描述撤销操作的原因。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Resolve appeal on a subject
ast.target: 解决对主题的申诉。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describe resolution.
ast.target: 描述解决方案。

ast.name: description
